Once upon a time, there was an ambitious raccoon named Lunaolestovorous.

Lunaolestovorous loved birds. She spent her evenings sitting in birdwatch parlours listening to the songs of owls and ravetails.

One day, Lunaolestovorous heard something melodious unlike anything she’d ever known. It was a song, gentle as a dawn, that seemed to weave emotions.
